rationale: Adds a new AGENTS.md documentation file describing Cursor Cloud development setup for the Runnit Back HQ Next.js 14 + Supabase project. The document covers dev server / build commands (npm run dev, npm run build, npx tsc --noEmit, npm run build:worker), required environment variables (NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_ANON_KEY), hardcoded development login credentials (manny/sports123, matt/arena123, maly/women123, agent/combat123, PIN 000000), and architecture notes about middleware.ts, base64url session cookie 'rb_session', and lib/auth-edge.ts edge-compatible decoder. Pure docs addition with no code changes; matches the PR title and body exactly.
